resources.metaDescription: Where to go next, and how to plug into your local Ingress community.
resources.title: Resources
resources.intro: Where to go next, and how to plug into the people around you.
resources.findTeam.heading: Find your local team
resources.findTeam.body: The single most useful thing you can do. There is no one official channel, communities run on Telegram, Discord, Signal and others, and each area sorts out its own. The fastest way in:
resources.findTeam.step1: Ask whoever sent you this link.
resources.findTeam.step2: Post in faction comms: "new RES agent in [your area], where's the local chat?"
resources.findTeam.step3: Turn up to a First Saturday and ask in person.
resources.official.heading: Official Ingress
resources.community.heading: Community sites and tools
resources.community.body: Maintained by players, not Niantic. Your local team will have opinions on what's worth using, so ask.
